rationale: The citing paper gives this source a clear functional role in its literature positioning, explicitly summarizing Bruce, Becker, and Reinartz (2020) as evidence on which TV ad cues drive sales and listing it in its comparative prior-work table. It also cites the paper as methodological precedent when describing its own ad-coding process (use of student coders). The citing study then moves beyond that prior cue-sales work by examining informational versus emotional content effects across both online search and sales and by testing moderation by price and quality.
relation_description: The citing paper extends the cited paper's ad-content effectiveness line of work by shifting to informational and emotional content and adding a multi-stage funnel outcome framework (online search plus sales) with positioning-based heterogeneity tests. It uses the cited paper as both a benchmark in prior findings and a coding-practice precedent.
